summary: Good‑quality audience recording of a solid show with standout Althea, Playin' in the Band and white‑hot Big River, though a few numbers fall flat.
review: The Aud tape is surprisingly clean and full‑bodied for an audience source, delivering clear sound without the typical muddiness. Musically the concert is enjoyable – Althea shines, Playin' in the Band soars, and Big River burns white‑hot, while a couple of numbers (Friend of the Devil, Estimated Prophet) miss the mark.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers are upbeat about the performance and note good recording quality; limited to two reviews so rating reflects a weighted average of show (≈3.2) and sound (≈3.8).

recording_quality.technical_notes: Full, clean sound with little muddiness; reviewers call it very good for an Aud despite no explicit issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High energy start with a killer Saturday night opener, tight jams and sweet Jerry ballads throughout; overall solid pacing despite a few weaker moments.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Sweet ballads noted and killer solos praised.
